message:
fix(mobile): differentiate tab bar height between portrait/landscape

Improves canvas height calculation for different orientations:

SequenceView.tsx:
- Split mobileTabBarHeight into portrait (56px) and landscape (48px)
- Portrait uses taller tab bar for easier touch targets
- Landscape uses shorter tab bar to maximize vertical space
- Both include safe-area-inset-bottom for home indicator

control-deck.css:
- Remove !important from pointer-events: auto on .tab-btn
- Add :not(:disabled):not([disabled]) selector for pointer-events
- Disabled buttons should not capture touch events

The separate height variables ensure canvas stops exactly at the
control deck boundary in both orientations, preventing touch event
conflicts where the canvas captures taps meant for navigation.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
